data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for per-order license key issuance and status tracking. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the implementation of this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence of its coverage or functionality, indicating a gap in the requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of per-order license key issuance and status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
